pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 17.
Set Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 APIs and bytecode, failing to utilize Java 17 features or potentially causing runtime issues if Java 17-specific APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 17.
Add Jakarta RESTful Web Services API dependency to replace javax.ws.rs.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 and Java EE/Jakarta EE migration requires Jakarta namespaces; javax.ws.rs classes are no longer available, causing compile errors if referenced.

src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.general_idea: Migrate javax.inject.Inject import to jakarta.inject.Inject to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.why_exists: The javax.inject package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.inject does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.general_idea: Migrate javax.ws.rs.GET import to jakarta.ws.rs.GET to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.why_exists: The javax.ws.rs package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.ws.rs does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.general_idea: Migrate javax.ws.rs.Path import to jakarta.ws.rs.Path to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.why_exists: The javax.ws.rs package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.ws.rs does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.general_idea: Migrate javax.ws.rs.Produces import to jakarta.ws.rs.Produces to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.why_exists: The javax.ws.rs package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.ws.rs does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.general_idea: Migrate javax.ws.rs.core.MediaType import to jakarta.ws.rs.core.MediaType to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/Greeti.why_exists: The javax.ws.rs package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.ws.rs does not exist'.

src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/MyBean.general_idea: Migrate Java EE imports to Jakarta EE namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/org/acme/quickstart/MyBean.why_exists: The javax.enterprise package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code will fail to compile with 'package javax.enterprise.context does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.
